Dropdown + Tags (TagArea)

A dropdown input that shows selected values as tags/chips inside the input area. Combines <lyte-dropdown> multi-select with tag chips display for multi-tag selection, filter builders, and assignee selectors.

Form Figma Synced 5 Variants
Empty — No Tags Selected
Default
HTML
<!-- Empty TagArea — no tags selected -->
<div class="zc-tagarea">
    <div class="zc-tagarea-tags"></div>
    <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select tags..."
                   class="zc-dropdown zc-tagarea-dropdown">
        <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
            <lyte-drop-item>Design</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Development</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Marketing</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Sales</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Support</lyte-drop-item>
        </template>
    </lyte-dropdown>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tagarea {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  min-height: 38px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D0D5DD);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
.zc-tagarea:focus-within {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
}
With Tags — Selected Values as Chips
2 Tags
Design Dev
4 Tags
Design Dev Marketing Sales
HTML
<!-- TagArea with selected tags -->
<div class="zc-tagarea">
    <div class="zc-tagarea-tags">
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Design
            <button class="zc-tag-close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Dev
            <button class="zc-tag-close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
    </div>
    <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select tags..."
                   class="zc-dropdown zc-tagarea-dropdown">
        <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
            <lyte-drop-item>Marketing</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Sales</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Support</lyte-drop-item>
        </template>
    </lyte-dropdown>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tagarea-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}

.zc-tagarea-dropdown {
  flex: 1 1 120px;
  min-width: 120px;
}
With Search — Searchable Dropdown
Search Enabled
Design
No Tags + Search
HTML
<!-- TagArea with searchable dropdown -->
<div class="zc-tagarea">
    <div class="zc-tagarea-tags">
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Design
            <button class="zc-tag-close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
    </div>
    <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Search tags..."
                   lt-prop-search="true"
                   class="zc-dropdown zc-tagarea-dropdown">
        <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
            <lyte-drop-item>Development</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Marketing</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Sales</lyte-drop-item>
        </template>
    </lyte-dropdown>
</div>
SCSS
/* Search-enabled dropdown inherits standard styles.
   Add lt-prop-search="true" to <lyte-dropdown>. */

.zc-tagarea-dropdown[lt-prop-search="true"] {
  /* Lyte handles the search input automatically */
}
Overflow — Many Tags with "+N more"
Overflow (8 tags)
Design Dev Marketing Sales Support +3 more
Overflow (12 tags)
Design Dev Marketing +9 more
HTML
<!-- Overflow TagArea with "+N more" indicator -->
<div class="zc-tagarea">
    <div class="zc-tagarea-tags">
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Design
            <button class="zc-tag-close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Dev
            <button class="zc-tag-close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-success zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Marketing
            <button class="zc-tag-close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
        <!-- ... more tags ... -->
        <span class="zc-tagarea-overflow">+3 more</span>
    </div>
    <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Add more..."
                   class="zc-dropdown zc-tagarea-dropdown">
        <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
            <lyte-drop-item>QA</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>DevOps</lyte-drop-item>
        </template>
    </lyte-dropdown>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tagarea-overflow {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #475467);
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F2F4F7);
  border-radius: 10px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.zc-tagarea-overflow:hover {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle-hover, #E4E7EC);
}
Disabled — Non-interactive State
Disabled (empty)
Disabled (with tags)
Design Dev
HTML
<!-- Disabled TagArea -->
<div class="zc-tagarea zc-tagarea-disabled">
    <div class="zc-tagarea-tags">
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Design
            <button class="zc-tag-close" disabled><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
        <span class="zc-tag zc-tag-primary zc-tag-sm zc-tag-removable">
            Dev
            <button class="zc-tag-close" disabled><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
        </span>
    </div>
    <lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select tags..."
                   lt-prop-disabled="true"
                   class="zc-dropdown zc-tagarea-dropdown">
        <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
            <lyte-drop-item>Marketing</lyte-drop-item>
            <lyte-drop-item>Sales</lyte-drop-item>
        </template>
    </lyte-dropdown>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tagarea-disabled {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F2F4F7);
}
.zc-tagarea-disabled .zc-tag-close {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
}
